name: accounting-system-monorepo
description: Monorepo for desktop, backend, and future android client

scripts.setup: npm --prefix frontend-desktop install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.desktop:start: npm run version:sync && npm --prefix frontend-desktop run start
scripts.desktop:build: npm run version:sync && npm --prefix frontend-desktop run build
scripts.desktop:rebuild: npm run version:sync && npm --prefix frontend-desktop run rebuild
scripts.backend:rebuild-native: npm run version:sync && npm --prefix backend rebuild better-sqlite3
scripts.backend:start: npm run version:sync && npm --prefix backend run start
scripts.backend:dev: npm run version:sync && npm --prefix backend run dev
scripts.backend:check: npm run version:sync && npm --prefix backend run compat:check
